# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

The repository is maintained on the latest version in `master`.

| Version | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| Latest code on `master` | Yes |
| Older commits, tags, and forks | No |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Do not open a public GitHub issue for security reports.

Use GitHub's private vulnerability reporting for this repository if it is enabled. If private reporting is unavailable, contact the maintainer directly through GitHub at <https://github.com/Ammaar-Alam>.

Include:

- a short description of the issue
- the affected route, script, or component
- reproduction steps or a minimal proof of concept
- impact assessment and any suggested mitigation

You should receive an acknowledgement within 72 hours. Status updates will be shared as investigation and remediation progress.

Please avoid public disclosure until a fix is available and deployed.
